title: Forkpack
description: A modpack that adds the create mod and performance enhancement mods
body:
## Mods Included

Forkpack is a modpack which adds a few mods built around Create. But, to keep the game running well, Forkpack also adds preformace improvement mods to make sure the game is running smoothly. 

## Preformance

### IMPORTANT: Preventing Lag Spikes

To keep lag spikes to a minimum, a Custom Java Argument can be added, the process is different for each launcher:
- Modrinth Launcher: Instance Settings > Java and memory > Java arguments
- Prism Launcher: Edit instance > Settings > Java > Java arguments

Click the "Java Arguments" box and paste this in the text field below:

```
-XX:+UseZGC
```

This will make Java use the ZGC garbage collector, which is less prone to lag spikes.

#

The popular Sodium and Lithium mods are used to improve preformance in this modpack. Vannila Minecraft struggles to keep a good framerate because of lag spikes, memory issues, game logic issues, and rendering bugs. Meanwhile, even with  some mods that add preformance overhead, Sodium and Lithuim are able to keep this modpack running well, because of opimiztions of the games code. 

![An image of 3 different types of minecraft with thier varying FPS](https://github.com/shbozz-commander/Forkpack/blob/main/advertizement.png?raw=true)

*All of these have Distant Horizons enabled and set to "medium" settings. 

### Forkpack Server Edition

Forkpack includes rendering mods that might not be compatible with a server. If you want Forkpack for a server you can get Forkpack Server Edition [here](https://www.modrinth.com/modpack/forkpack-server).
